content: Great! Let's get started on your Bank Account Opening Form. First, could you please provide your full name?

It looks like there was an issue with the location you provided. You mentioned "Coimbatore," which is in India, but the selected country is "China." Please double-check your country selection and make sure it matches the district you want to use. If you intended to select India, please update the country accordingly. Thank you!

Great! Let's get started on opening your bank account. First, could you please provide your full name?
